channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Prosecutors to retry Alex Murdaugh in deaths of wife and son after high court overturned convictions
item.description: Alex Murdaugh’s murder convictions and life sentence for the deaths of his wife and son have been overturned by the South Carolina Supreme Court because the court clerk at his trial suggested he was guilty.

item.title: A timeline of events in the cases against Alex Murdaugh
Democratic primary for Nebraska’s ‘blue dot’ US House seat is too early to call
